titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 892S
GA 892S
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Correction added at 12.8 by David Parker.
Word break in * and C* at 10.31 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
lac rest verse deleted from 10.6 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 17.26 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Liste id fixed (was missing a zero) by Rachel Kevern.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 04_308921_EEName of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed:308rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: E. PANOUTranscription begun: Dec 25Transcription finished: Dec 30 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No Other remarks: Numerous spelling mistakes. Often omits the first letter in the beginning of a sentence. This missing letter has been marked as [ill]x[\ill]. This manuscript is a supplement to 04_308920_EE from which 10.5-12.17 and 14.22 until the end are missing and have been supplemented by the scriber of manuscript 04_308921_EE.
